steps.title: Identify what the task requires
steps.content: The task requires emphasizing a similarity between Erasure and Home Grown. The notes reveal that both feature discarded objects.

steps.title: Find the choice that accomplishes this directly
steps.content: C accomplishes this by stating “both Erasure and Home Grown include discarded objects” and then providing specific examples from each work. A emphasizes differences with “however,” B omits the two-work connection, and D lists only dates. This matches choice C — C is correct.
